backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Notice type and providing addNotice and getAllNotices functions to store and retrieve school announcements in a list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Gallery component displays two real campus photos (FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg and FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg) as required by feature REQ-6.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Sandharka Green English Boarding School' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, About, Stats, Facilities, Notices, Gallery, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column section displaying the school campus image alongside history/mission text, location details, and four feature highlight cards with icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section rendering address, phone, email, and office hours info cards, a campus image map placeholder, and a submit-able contact form.
frontend/src/components/Facilities.tsx: Grid section showcasing eight school facilities (library, labs, computer lab, sports, boarding, dining, arts, green campus) as icon cards with descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with school branding, contact details, smooth-scroll quick links, school info summary, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Renders a photo gallery section displaying two real campus photos as featured side-by-side images plus a 4-item grid, each with overlay labels and hover zoom effects.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, school name, tagline, location text, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to 'about' and 'contact' sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed responsive navigation bar with scroll-aware background, desktop link buttons, and a mobile hamburger menu that smooth-scrolls to page sections.
frontend/src/components/Notices.tsx: Displays school notices fetched via a React Query hook, rendering loading, error, empty, and populated states with individual NoticeCard components showing title, content, and date.
frontend/src/components/Stats.tsx: Presents four key school statistics (students, teachers, founding year, pass rate) in a dark forest-themed grid section with icon cards and decorative background pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking across the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useGetAllNotices` that fetches all notices from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a forest-green/white OKLCH-based CSS custom property theme for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom forest-green and gold color palettes, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom fonts, shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Sandharka Green English Boarding School website, including versioning, existing features, generated images, and architectural notes.
